weekly_meal_plan.name: 7-day keto protocol meal plan

meals.name: High Protein Cheeseburger Omelette Recipe
meals.recipe:
Whisk together eggs and eggwhites
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Add eggs to skillet and cover pan with aluminum foil
Cook until desired doneness
In a second skillet, cook ground beef with salt & pepper
Spread cooked ground beef on one side of eggs
Top ground beef with tomato and pickle
Fold eggs over beef
Sprinkle with cheese
Cook until cheese is slightly melted
Finish off with ketchup and serve

meals.name: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)

meals.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
meals.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

meals.name: Doro Wat Ethiopian Chicken Stew
ingredients: 3-3½ pounds (1.3-1.6kg) chicken, (cut in pieces (or chicken thighs))
3 tablespoons (42g) spiced butter, (or more (sub with cooking oil))
4-6 large eggs, (soft boiled and shells removed)
meals.recipe:
Season chicken with, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large pot over medium heat, and when it's hot, add spiced butter and onions. Sauté onions, stirring frequently, until they are deep brown - 7-10 minutes.
After the onions are caramelized or reach a deep brown color, add some more oil, followed by the Berbere spice, garlic, and ginger.
Stir for about 2-3 minutes for the flavors to blossom and the mixture has a deep rich brown color. Be careful not to let it burn.
Then add about 2-3 cups water. Add chicken, tomato paste, paprika, basil, salt, and cook for about 30 minutes.
Throw in the eggs and lemon juice; thoroughly mix to ensure that the eggs are immersed in the sauce.
Continue cooking until chicken is tender about 10 minutes or more.
Adjust sauce thickness and seasoning with water or broth, lemon, salt according to preference.
Serve warm.

meals.name: White Chocolate Peppermint Protein Bars Recipe
meals.recipe:
Sift together coconut flour and protein powder
In a separate bowl, melt coconut oil
Add peanut butter and honey to melted coconut oil and mix until combined
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix well
Line a dish with parchment paper
Evenly spread mixture into pan
Sprinkle with crushed peppermint and lightly press into top of bars
Place in refrigerator to set
Remove and cut into desired size pieces
Store in refrigerator until ready to enjoy

meals.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

meals.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Chicken Stew)
meals.recipe:
In a large pot over medium-low heat, add the niter kibbeh and allow it to melt.
Add the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and cook until caramelized.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, cumin, and salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken stock, add the tomato paste, and chicken thighs.
Cook for 30-40 minutes or till the chicken is tender.
Add in the boiled eggs and simmer for 10 mins on low heat.
Taste for spices & adjust.

meals.name: Scallop Cerviche Recipe
ingredients: Juice of 6 limes, enough to cover scallops
meals.recipe:
Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold

meals.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
meals.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

meals.name: Thai Spiced Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Lime wedges and salad greens to serve
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F
Put chicken in a shallow dish in one layer
Blend a third of the yogurt, the curry paste and 3 tbsp of cilantro, season well with salt and pour over chicken, turning pieces until evenly coated
Leave for at least 10 minutes or in fridge overnight
Lift chicken onto a rack in a roasting tin and roast for 35-40 minutes until golden
Blend together remaining yogurt and cilantro, finely chop cucumber and stir into yogurt mixture, season
Serve with the chicken and garnish with lime wedges and salad greens

meals.name: Ethiopian Gomen Wat Recipe
meals.recipe:
In a large saucepan or pot, melt the Niter Kibbeh.
Add onion and saute on medium low heat until the onions are very soft, about 5-8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika, cardamom seeds, cumin, coriander and Scotch Bonnet pepper. Cook for a few minutes to bloom the spices.
Add collard greens and give it a stir.
Cover pot and cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
Add salt and stir to combine.

meals.name: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
meals.recipe:
Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

meals.name: doro wat - Ethiopian chicken curry
ingredients: 6 boneless skinless chicken thighs cut into 3 pieces per thigh.
2 tbsp Ethiopian berbere (- increasingly available at specialty food shops. If salt is listed in the first 4 ingredients keep looking.)
2/3 tsp kosher salt (- use a bit less if you are using table salt)
2 tbsp garlic ginger paste (- see notes)
meals.recipe:
The onion paste
doro wat

meals.name: Turkey Sausage Frittata With Egg Whites Recipe
meals.recipe:
Brown sausage in pan while thawing broccoli in the microwave
Mix together and season to taste
Place in 9x11 baking dish
Pour egg whites over almost to cover
Bake at 350-375 for approximately 40 minutes

meals.name: Simple Salmon Salad Recipe
meals.recipe:
Mince shallot and zest lemon.
In a small bowl mix lemon zest, lemon juice, shallot, and dijon mustard. Whisk in olive oil until smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste and set aside.
Wash and chop lettuce and tomatoes. Set aside.
Cook bacon until crispy and let cool. Once cooled, chop into bite-sized pieces.
Peel and cube avocado.
Divide ingredients into four portions and toss together lettuce, tomato, bacon, and avocado.
Pan sear or warm salmon in the oven for a few minutes.
Toss salad greens in dressing and top with warmed salmon.
Enjoy!

meals.name: Low Carb Pancakes With Raspberries Recipe
meals.recipe:
Mix egg whites and almond flour together
Heat coconut oil in skillet
Pour half of batter into skillet and cook until brown around edges then flip
Cook other side until brown
Repeat with remaining batter
Serve with raspberries

meals.name: Sega Wat (Ethiopian Beef Stew)
meals.recipe:
Heat a large pot and add the niter kibbeh.
Toss in the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and let them sizzle until they caramelize.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, and a pinch of salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the stock, along with tomato paste, to create a hearty base. Then, add the tender stew beef cubes to the pot.
Let the stew simmer gently for about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Place the boiled eggs into the simmering stew and simmer for about 10 minutes on low heat.
Taste for spices and adjust according to your preference.

meals.name: Keto BBQ Chicken Pizza with Cauliflower Crust
ingredients: 1/2 Cup of G Hughes Sugar-Free Barbecue Sauce
meals.recipe:
Preheat the oven to 400F. Insert your round pizza pan or baking sheet in the oven and allow it to preheat along with the oven. Meanwhile, process your cauliflower in a food processor. If you bought a whole head of cauliflower, start by breaking down the cauliflower into even florets. Transfer the cauliflower to a bowl to hold, and then process in batches, making sure you get a fine cauliflower rice. Transfer the now processed cauliflower into a separate bowl, repeating the process until the e...
After the cauliflower is cooked, carefully remove it from the microwave, and spread it on top of a baking sheet lined with paper towels (have ready before removing bowls). For better results, add a few layers of paper towels at the base of the baking sheet, as this will help absorb as much moisture as possible. Spread the now-cooked cauliflower rice on the sheet tray and spread the cauliflower as evenly as possible. Using another set of paper towels, press these against the cauliflower and ta...
Carefully remove the now heated round pizza pan or baking sheet from the oven, using a cloth towel. Spray with spray oil and carefully transfer the dough from the parchment paper into the preheated sheet pan. Bake at 400F for 10 minutes. After the 10 minutes are done, remove from the oven, and add your toppings.
Once the 10 minutes are up, remove the cauliflower crust from the oven, and add the barbecue sauce as the base of the crust, followed by ¾ cup of mozzarella cheese, diced chicken, and sliced red onions. Return the pizza to the oven and bake for a final 5-7 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and all ingredients are heated through. Remove pizza from the oven, slice with a pizza cutter, and serve immediately! Enjoy!

meals.name: Awaze Tibs - Ethiopian Beef Tibs Recipe
meals.recipe:
Make Awaze Sauce
Make Beef Tibs

meals.name: Crustless Low-Carb Protein Pumpkin Pie Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Spray a pie dish with nonstick spray.
Add all ingredients to a bowl and mix well.
Bake for ~45-50 minutes or until just set.
Place in refrigerator to set for 4-6 hours.

meals.name: Lemon-Thyme Roast Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Six 4-inch fresh thyme sprigs or 2 tsp dried thyme leaves
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Sprinkle chicken cavities with pepper and salt
Roll lemons pressing lightly until softened, pierce each lemon 15 times about 1 inch deep
Place pierced lemons, 5 garlic cloves and thyme into large cavity of chicken, place remaining garlic into small cavity
Truss chicken. Sprinkle evenly with remaining pepper and salt
Place chicken breast-side up onto rack in large roasting pan
Roast 2 to 2.25 hours until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear
Remove from oven, let stand 10 minutes
Remove and discard skin, carve chicken and serve garnished with additional thyme sprigs

meals.name: Chocolate Caramel And Coffee Protein Shake Recipe
meals.recipe:
Place 8 ounces of brewed coffee and 8 ounces of milk into a shaker cup
Add 2 tablespoons of caramel creamer
Add 2 scoops of chocolate whey protein powder
Shake well and drink

meals.name: The Fluffiest Keto Cloud 'Bread' Of All Time Recipe
ingredients: 160g/4.44 tablespoons egg whites, separated from yolks
1.5g or ½ teaspoon cream of tartar
141g or 5 oz cream cheese, room temperature
1 pinch sea salt or table salt
Optional: sliced chives and ½ teaspoon minced garlic
meals.recipe:
Preheat the oven to 325 F.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, foil, or a nonstick silicone baking pad. Spray with spray oil of choice.
Separate 3 whole eggs into egg whites and yolks, adding the egg whites into the mixing bowl and yolks into a separate, small bowl. Complete the total amount of egg whites by adding whites from an egg white carton.
Whip the egg whites using the mixer for about 3 minutes until whites have just begun to mix. Add cream of tartar and mix for another 8-10 minutes, stopping and scraping down the sides of the mixing bowl constantly, until you have stiff peaks.
In the freshly cleaned mixing bowl, add the room temp cream cheese and mix with the whisk attachment for 1-2 minutes to further temper it. Add the egg yolks, a small amount at a time, and mix for another 2-5 minutes.
Once egg yolk/cream cheese mix is fully incorporated, slowly fold in the egg white peaks, a little bit at a time, by gently mixing the whites into the yolk/cream cheese mix.
Scoop out and measure a 70-gram portion of the bread 'dough' mix in a small bowl or container. Then transfer to your lined baking sheet, scraping all sides of the container. Flatten out each bread with a spatula to create an even round shape. Repeat until all ‘dough’ is portioned out, leaving ¾” to 1” between the breads on the baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes. Set a timer and rotate the pan halfway through (don't flip the breads, just rotate the pan 180 degrees).
Carefully remove breads from the sheet pan, let cool, and enjoy!

meals.name: Easy Bake Chorizo & Veggie Quiche Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Coat 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Cook chorizo, onion and shredded potato
Whisk together eggs, egg whites, cottage cheese, salt and pepper
Add meat, onion, potato and broccoli to eggs
Evenly divide among 6 cups
Bake for 40-45 minutes
Allow to cool then gently remove from mold

meals.name: Smoked Paprika Steak Stir Fry Recipe
meals.recipe:
Wash and chop your veggies and slice the steak into bite-sized pieces. Mince the fresh cilantro leaves and stems.
Using spray oil, coat a non-stick skillet and saute asparagus over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add tomatoes and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add steak and cook for an additional minute, then turn off the heat.
Add sauce mixture to the pan and stir to coat everything evenly.
Plate it and dig in!

meals.name: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe
meals.recipe:
Cube chicken
Place cilantro, minced garlic, lime zest, lime juice, olive oil, salt and pepper into a bowl and stir
Place cubed chicken into marinade, cover and refrigerate 30-60 minutes maximum (citrus starts breaking down protein after 60 minutes)
Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa for dipping sauce
Place chicken on 8 skewers and cook on grill
Serve with salsa cream dipping sauce

meals.name: Kitfo (Ethiopian Steak Tartare Recipe)
meals.recipe:
Set out a large high-powered food processor. Make sure to trim all the silver skin and fat off the fillet and cut the fillet into large chunks. Place in the food processor.
Add the cayenne, salt, anchovy paste, garlic powder, and cardamom. Pulse to chop the fillet into fine chunks. You can choose to stop with when the beef resembles ¼ inch chunks, or chop smaller into ground steak.
Once the texture is to your liking, melt the clarified butter and pour over the top. Mix the butter in by hand, do not pulse.
Serve raw immediately, cover and chill, or pan-fry over high heat for 1 -2 minutes.

meals.name: Banana Chocolate Chip Protein Bars Recipe
meals.recipe:
Sift together protein powder and coconut flour
Add in vanilla extract, stevia and almond milk
Mix until a dough is formed
Mix in chocolate chips
Evenly divide dough and shape into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

meals.name: Vegan Low-Carb Breakfast Taco Recipe
ingredients: pinch black pepper and sea salt
meals.recipe:
Crumble tofu into a large bowl and add spices.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat for 1 minute then add oil.
Add tofu to the hot skillet and cook for 5-8 minutes until golden and firm. Finish with Lime juice.
To Build Taco: Gently place the tofu filling into your jicama tortilla and top with 1-2 Tablespoons of pico or salsa along with fresh cilantro.

meals.name: Berbere Chicken (Delicious Ethiopian Chicken)
meals.recipe:
Begin by preheating your oven to 425°F.
In a medium bowl, combine olive oil, berbere spice, lemon juice, and cayenne pepper (if desired). Mix them together until you have a thick, flavorful paste.
Generously rub the berbere seasoning all over your chicken pieces.
Line a sheet pan with parchment paper and place chicken skin side down in a single layer.
Pop them into the preheated oven and bake for 18-20 minutes, ensuring they reach an internal temperature of at least 165°F.
Once perfectly cooked, let the chicken thighs rest for a few minutes.

meals.name: Braised Beef Blumenberg With Mushrooms And Cauliflower Recipe
meals.recipe:
In a large heavy stew pot add coconut oil, heat on high
Brown beef in batches until all liquid has evaporated and drippings look very dark and caramelized
Return all browned beef to pan, add onions and celery, cook until onions turn transparent
Add water to cover the beef
Add mushrooms and cauliflower cut into chunks
Season with Lawry's salt and pepper
Add enough water to just cover all ingredients
Bring to a boil then cover and turn heat to low
Cook covered for approximately 1.5 hours until liquid is reduced and meat is tender

meals.name: The Best Avocado Ahi Tuna Salad
ingredients: 1/2 Cup of Diced Yellow Bell Peppers
meals.recipe:
In a medium-size bowl mash up the ahi tuna. Then add the avocado and mix.
Add in the tomatoes, bell peppers, onions, and lemon juice. Mix.
Serve with bread of choice, or use this as a base for lettuce wraps!

meals.name: Garlic Shrimp Zucchini Noodle Recipe
ingredients: 2 Medium zucchinis or 1 package spiralized zucchini
3 tablespoons goat cheese, crumbled or feta cheese
meals.recipe:
Spiralize your zucchini or set aside a package of store-bought spiral zucchini. Remove the Trifecta Shrimp from the container and rinse, set aside. For the garlic use a Microplane or grater instead of trying to cut it up with your knife. This is a great trick when a recipe calls for a lot of garlic! Measure out all of the additional ingredients, feel free to add additional vegetables or more garlic depending on what you like!
Heat a non-stick skillet or saute pan over medium heat and add 1 teaspoon avocado oil and garlic. Cook for 2 minutes or until aromatic, add in the Trifecta shrimp and cook for 2 more minutes. If you are using raw shrimp, cook for 6-8 minutes until opaque and cooked through.
Add Acids, Herbs, and Goat Cheese
Add in the tomatoes and zucchini noodles, cook for 1-2 minutes until noodles are coated with the sauce.

meals.name: Low-Carb Portobello Mushroom Bruschetta
meals.recipe:
First, heat up a skillet or a grill. Then spray the Mushrooms with non stick spray. Grill for 2-3 minutes on each side. Remove from heat but keep the stove/ grill on.
In a bowl, mix the tomatoes, garlic, balsamic vinegar, and basil together. Add the mix to the inside of the mushrooms.
Top the mushrooms with cheese and place back on the skillet/grill.
Cover and heat for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Enjoy!

meals.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Bark Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter marshmallow protein powder
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients except chocolate peanut butter to a blender.
Mix well.
Spread on parchment paper.
Drizzle peanut butter on top.
Freeze overnight.
Break into pieces.

meals.name: Keto Mashed Cauliflower
ingredients: 6.5 cups/800g Cauliflower, Cut into Very Small Florets
0.5 cup/56.5 g Cheddar Cheese, Shredded + 0.25 cup/28.25 g to top off and broil
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420° F.
Cut cauliflower to very small floret size, enough to imitate the size/texture of macaroni pasta. Place in a foil lined sheet tray and drizzle with garlic powder, salt, 2 Tsp. pepper, and oil; toss gently to coat. Bake, for 12-15 minutes, until tender. Check constantly to avoid florets from burning. Remove once golden brown.
Cut bacon strips half lengthwise, and then widthwise to small rectangular strips. Add bacon to a sauté pan, and bring the heat up from cold to medium. The bacon will begin rendering and cooking slowly. Don't stir for some time, until bacon begins to crisp up. Once the bacon begins looking like crispy small teeth, stir with a wooden utensil, and remove from heat once fully crispy. Keep aside in a plate lined with paper towels. This will absorb the excess fat. Feel free to use some of the fat a...
In a medium saucepan, combine cream, nutritional yeast, cheese, and remaining 2 Tsp. black pepper and 2 Tsp. of garlic powder. Over medium heat, and constantly stirring, heat up mixture while the cheese melts and incorporates. Mix often with a whisk. Once fully melted, reduce heat to low and keep warm, stirring every once in a while until ready. If the mixture is too thick, add extra milk.
Switch oven to broil. Once cauliflower is ready, transfer to a baking dish or a shallow oven-safe baking dish, enough to hold the cauliflower and the sauce together. Combine the former with the bacon, and the cheese sauce. Add 1/4 cup of cheese on top and broil until cheese is golden brown and crispy on top. Feel free to add chives or green onion bulbs for garnish. Serve warm.

meals.name: Healthy High Protein Chicken Parmesan Meatloaf Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground chicken breast or turkey
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
In a large bowl combine ground chicken, onion, garlic, egg, oats, 1/4 cup pasta sauce, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper
Mix until combined
Shape mixture into a loaf shape and place on lined baking sheet
Bake for approximately 45 minutes
Remove from oven
Top with remaining pasta sauce and mozzarella cheese
Put back in oven until cheese is melted
Allow to sit 10 minutes then serve

meals.name: Low-Carb Grilled Greek Turkey Cutlets & Fresh Green Beans Recipe
meals.recipe:
Saute green beans in olive oil over medium heat until tender
Toss with salt and pepper to taste
Grill turkey cutlets until cooked through
Divide cutlets among plates
Sprinkle cutlets with olives, feta, tomato and fresh mint if desired
Serve with green beans

meals.name: Sesame CranButter Sirloin Steak Tip Skewers Recipe
ingredients: 3/4 cup Nuts N More High Protein Sesame Cranbutter
meals.recipe:
Mix together sesame cranbutter, liquid aminos, garlic and hot water.
Cut sirloin steak into strips.
Marinate in refrigerator for 3-4 hours.
Thread onto skewers and grill to desired doneness.
Serve with remaining marinade as dipping sauce.

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~54% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (keto).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 2 cups fruit and 2 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~26 g/day.

alternatives.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Chicken Stew)
alternatives.recipe:
In a large pot over medium-low heat, add the niter kibbeh and allow it to melt.
Add the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and cook until caramelized.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, cumin, and salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken stock, add the tomato paste, and chicken thighs.
Cook for 30-40 minutes or till the chicken is tender.
Add in the boiled eggs and simmer for 10 mins on low heat.

alternatives.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
alternatives.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

3 tablespoons (42g) spiced butter, (or more (sub with cooking oil))
4-6 large eggs, (soft boiled and shells removed)
alternatives.recipe:
Season chicken with, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large pot over medium heat, and when it's hot, add spiced butter and onions. Sauté onions, stirring frequently, until they are deep brown - 7-10 minutes.

Place a green bean mix in an oven-safe baking dish. Sprinkle almond/parm mix on top.

alternatives.name: The Fluffiest Keto Cloud 'Bread' Of All Time Recipe
ingredients: 160g/4.44 tablespoons egg whites, separated from yolks
1.5g or ½ teaspoon cream of tartar
141g or 5 oz cream cheese, room temperature
1 pinch sea salt or table salt
Optional: sliced chives and ½ teaspoon minced garlic
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat the oven to 325 F.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, foil, or a nonstick silicone baking pad. Spray with spray oil of choice.
Separate 3 whole eggs into egg whites and yolks, adding the egg whites into the mixing bowl and yolks into a separate, small bowl. Complete the total amount of egg whites by adding whites from an egg white carton.
Whip the egg whites using the mixer for about 3 minutes until whites have just begun to mix. Add cream of tartar and mix for another 8-10 minutes, stopping and scraping down the sides of the mixing bowl constantly, until you have stiff peaks.
In the freshly cleaned mixing bowl, add the room temp cream cheese and mix with the whisk attachment for 1-2 minutes to further temper it. Add the egg yolks, a small amount at a time, and mix for another 2-5 minutes.
Once egg yolk/cream cheese mix is fully incorporated, slowly fold in the egg white peaks, a little bit at a time, by gently mixing the whites into the yolk/cream cheese mix.
Scoop out and measure a 70-gram portion of the bread 'dough' mix in a small bowl or container. Then transfer to your lined baking sheet, scraping all sides of the container. Flatten out each bread with a spatula to create an even round shape. Repeat until all ‘dough’ is portioned out, leaving ¾” to 1” between the breads on the baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes. Set a timer and rotate the pan halfway through (don't flip the breads, just rotate the pan 180 degrees).
Carefully remove breads from the sheet pan, let cool, and enjoy!

Truss chicken. Sprinkle evenly with remaining pepper and salt
Place chicken breast-side up onto rack in large roasting pan
Roast 2 to 2.25 hours until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear
Remove from oven, let stand 10 minutes
Remove and discard skin, carve chicken and serve garnished with additional thyme sprigs

alternatives.recipe:

Blend a third of the yogurt, the curry paste and 3 tbsp of cilantro, season well with salt and pour over chicken, turning pieces until evenly coated
Leave for at least 10 minutes or in fridge overnight

alternatives.name: Low-Carb Pasta with Cashew Chicken Alfredo
ingredients: 1 Pack of Tofu Shirataki Fettuccini Noodles
alternatives.recipe:
Using a blender, blend the cashews, almond milk, and nutritional yeast. Blend until smooth / moderately thick consistency is reached.
Then, rinse the Shirataki noodles a few times and dry.
On a cutting board, cut up the Trifecta Chicken into slices.
Heat a skillet up to medium temperatures. Spray with non-stick spray. Add the chicken and grill until slightly brown. Remove the chicken from heat.
Once all of the chicken has been removed, spray the skillet again with non-stick spray. Add the Shirataki noodles and cook for about a minute (make sure to move the noodles around).
Pour the cashew sauce into the pan. Mix the pasta around with the sauce for a few minutes. Add more almond milk if the sauce starts to thicken.
Add the chicken back into the pan. Mix. Then add the fresh basil and let the basil cook into the pasta.
Remove pasta from heat and serve. Top with red pepper flakes for a kick.

alternatives.name: Keto Chocolate Pudding
ingredients: 2.7 fl oz./80 ml coconut milk, full fat
alternatives.recipe:

You can also do the first step on a food processor to reduce the number of dishes being used or feel free to use a hand blender to incorporate all ingredients in a bowl. A food processor would make the job much easier, but feel free to use what you have available.
Add the avocado, vanilla extract, spices, coffee, and orange zest (if using - highly recommend) to the food processor/bowl. Blend until smooth.
Transfer to a small bowl or round glass. Chill in the refrigerator for 10-20 minutes.

alternatives.name: The Fluffiest Keto Cloud 'Bread' Of All Time Recipe
ingredients: 160g/4.44 tablespoons egg whites, separated from yolks
1.5g or ½ teaspoon cream of tartar
141g or 5 oz cream cheese, room temperature
1 pinch sea salt or table salt
Optional: sliced chives and ½ teaspoon minced garlic
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat the oven to 325 F.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, foil, or a nonstick silicone baking pad. Spray with spray oil of choice.
Separate 3 whole eggs into egg whites and yolks, adding the egg whites into the mixing bowl and yolks into a separate, small bowl. Complete the total amount of egg whites by adding whites from an egg white carton.
Whip the egg whites using the mixer for about 3 minutes until whites have just begun to mix. Add cream of tartar and mix for another 8-10 minutes, stopping and scraping down the sides of the mixing bowl constantly, until you have stiff peaks.
In the freshly cleaned mixing bowl, add the room temp cream cheese and mix with the whisk attachment for 1-2 minutes to further temper it. Add the egg yolks, a small amount at a time, and mix for another 2-5 minutes.
Once egg yolk/cream cheese mix is fully incorporated, slowly fold in the egg white peaks, a little bit at a time, by gently mixing the whites into the yolk/cream cheese mix.
Scoop out and measure a 70-gram portion of the bread 'dough' mix in a small bowl or container. Then transfer to your lined baking sheet, scraping all sides of the container. Flatten out each bread with a spatula to create an even round shape. Repeat until all ‘dough’ is portioned out, leaving ¾” to 1” between the breads on the baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes. Set a timer and rotate the pan halfway through (don't flip the breads, just rotate the pan 180 degrees).
Carefully remove breads from the sheet pan, let cool, and enjoy!

alternatives.name: Kitfo (Ethiopian Steak Tartare Recipe)
alternatives.recipe:
Set out a large high-powered food processor. Make sure to trim all the silver skin and fat off the fillet and cut the fillet into large chunks. Place in the food processor.
Add the cayenne, salt, anchovy paste, garlic powder, and cardamom. Pulse to chop the fillet into fine chunks. You can choose to stop with when the beef resembles ¼ inch chunks, or chop smaller into ground steak.
Once the texture is to your liking, melt the clarified butter and pour over the top. Mix the butter in by hand, do not pulse.
Serve raw immediately, cover and chill, or pan-fry over high heat for 1 -2 minutes.

alternatives.name: Keto Mashed Cauliflower
ingredients: 6.5 cups/800g Cauliflower, Cut into Very Small Florets
0.5 cup/56.5 g Cheddar Cheese, Shredded + 0.25 cup/28.25 g to top off and broil
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420° F.
Cut cauliflower to very small floret size, enough to imitate the size/texture of macaroni pasta. Place in a foil lined sheet tray and drizzle with garlic powder, salt, 2 Tsp. pepper, and oil; toss gently to coat. Bake, for 12-15 minutes, until tender. Check constantly to avoid florets from burning. Remove once golden brown.
Cut bacon strips half lengthwise, and then widthwise to small rectangular strips. Add bacon to a sauté pan, and bring the heat up from cold to medium. The bacon will begin rendering and cooking slowly. Don't stir for some time, until bacon begins to crisp up. Once the bacon begins looking like crispy small teeth, stir with a wooden utensil, and remove from heat once fully crispy. Keep aside in a plate lined with paper towels. This will absorb the excess fat. Feel free to use some of the fat a...
In a medium saucepan, combine cream, nutritional yeast, cheese, and remaining 2 Tsp. black pepper and 2 Tsp. of garlic powder. Over medium heat, and constantly stirring, heat up mixture while the cheese melts and incorporates. Mix often with a whisk. Once fully melted, reduce heat to low and keep warm, stirring every once in a while until ready. If the mixture is too thick, add extra milk.
Switch oven to broil. Once cauliflower is ready, transfer to a baking dish or a shallow oven-safe baking dish, enough to hold the cauliflower and the sauce together. Combine the former with the bacon, and the cheese sauce. Add 1/4 cup of cheese on top and broil until cheese is golden brown and crispy on top. Feel free to add chives or green onion bulbs for garnish. Serve warm.

alternatives.name: Matcha Fat Bombs Recipe
ingredients: 2/3 cup Protein powder (We use Thorne Vanilla)
1.5 Tbsp Tapioca Maltodextrin (50% of coconut oil)
alternatives.recipe:
Melt coconut oil over a double boiler. Set aside 2 Tsp. and keep warm.
Using a spoon, add maltodextrin, and matcha powder into 3 Tbsp coconut oil liquid, and mix with until a powder texture is formed.
In a separate bowl combine the nut butter, protein powder, and 2 Tsp. coconut oil. Mix into a smooth dough-like consistency. If too wet, add a little extra protein powder until you get that kneaded-like-dough consistency, even and not runny looking.
Using a food scale, portion out the dough into 24-gram pieces and roll into small, smooth balls.
Set aside in a small cookie tray or plate.
Once all balls are rolled, coat each ball in the matcha powder.
Refrigerate for a couple of hours to let them set.
Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Lemon-Thyme Roast Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Six 4-inch fresh thyme sprigs or 2 tsp dried thyme leaves
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Sprinkle chicken cavities with pepper and salt
Roll lemons pressing lightly until softened, pierce each lemon 15 times about 1 inch deep
Place pierced lemons, 5 garlic cloves and thyme into large cavity of chicken, place remaining garlic into small cavity
Truss chicken. Sprinkle evenly with remaining pepper and salt
Place chicken breast-side up onto rack in large roasting pan
Roast 2 to 2.25 hours until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear
Remove from oven, let stand 10 minutes
Remove and discard skin, carve chicken and serve garnished with additional thyme sprigs

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Gomen Wat Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
In a large saucepan or pot, melt the Niter Kibbeh.
Add onion and saute on medium low heat until the onions are very soft, about 5-8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika, cardamom seeds, cumin, coriander and Scotch Bonnet pepper. Cook for a few minutes to bloom the spices.
Add collard greens and give it a stir.
Cover pot and cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
Add salt and stir to combine.

alternatives.name: Gomen Wat (Ethiopian Collard Greens)
alternatives.recipe:
Add Niter Kibbeh to a pot.
When melted, add onions, garlic, and tomatoes.
Add cumin, coriander, and cardamom, and let it cook for about 5 minutes on low heat.
Add the chopped collard greens and stir.
Add salt, black pepper, paprika, and cayenne pepper.
Cook for about 20 minutes, stirring every few minutes, till the water is mostly evaporated.
Taste for salt and add more if needed.

alternatives.name: Thai Spiced Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Lime wedges and salad greens to serve
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F
Put chicken in a shallow dish in one layer
Blend a third of the yogurt, the curry paste and 3 tbsp of cilantro, season well with salt and pour over chicken, turning pieces until evenly coated
Leave for at least 10 minutes or in fridge overnight
Lift chicken onto a rack in a roasting tin and roast for 35-40 minutes until golden
Blend together remaining yogurt and cilantro, finely chop cucumber and stir into yogurt mixture, season
Serve with the chicken and garnish with lime wedges and salad greens

alternatives.name: Low-Carb Pasta with Cashew Chicken Alfredo
ingredients: 1 Pack of Tofu Shirataki Fettuccini Noodles
alternatives.recipe:
Using a blender, blend the cashews, almond milk, and nutritional yeast. Blend until smooth / moderately thick consistency is reached.
Then, rinse the Shirataki noodles a few times and dry.
On a cutting board, cut up the Trifecta Chicken into slices.
Heat a skillet up to medium temperatures. Spray with non-stick spray. Add the chicken and grill until slightly brown. Remove the chicken from heat.
Once all of the chicken has been removed, spray the skillet again with non-stick spray. Add the Shirataki noodles and cook for about a minute (make sure to move the noodles around).
Pour the cashew sauce into the pan. Mix the pasta around with the sauce for a few minutes. Add more almond milk if the sauce starts to thicken.
Add the chicken back into the pan. Mix. Then add the fresh basil and let the basil cook into the pasta.
Remove pasta from heat and serve. Top with red pepper flakes for a kick.

alternatives.name: Braised Beef Blumenberg With Mushrooms And Cauliflower Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
In a large heavy stew pot add coconut oil, heat on high
Brown beef in batches until all liquid has evaporated and drippings look very dark and caramelized
Return all browned beef to pan, add onions and celery, cook until onions turn transparent
Add water to cover the beef
Add mushrooms and cauliflower cut into chunks
Season with Lawry's salt and pepper
Add enough water to just cover all ingredients
Bring to a boil then cover and turn heat to low
Cook covered for approximately 1.5 hours until liquid is reduced and meat is tender

alternatives.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
alternatives.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Scallop Cerviche Recipe
ingredients: Juice of 6 limes, enough to cover scallops
alternatives.recipe:
Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold

alternatives.name: Banana Chocolate Chip Protein Bars Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Sift together protein powder and coconut flour
Add in vanilla extract, stevia and almond milk
Mix until a dough is formed
Mix in chocolate chips
Evenly divide dough and shape into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container
